TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Pololan, title = Pololan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Pololan} }

S.FORM: alang Pololan ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Nahuy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 48 buwan, 188 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 93% kyan ku 175 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 7% kyan ku 13 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 92%, saySiyat 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Pololan hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Pololan hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Pololan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Pololan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Pololan hya' ga Gowryu. tay 'zil na Pololan hya' ga Lkuxan. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Pololan ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Nahuy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 48 buwan, 188 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 93% kyan ku 175 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 7% kyan ku 13 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 92%, saySiyat 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Pololan hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Pololan hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Pololan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Pololan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Pololan hya' ga Gowryu. tay 'zil na Pololan hya' ga Lkuxan. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ pololan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku s~ɕinʦ~ʨik keŋ atu naħuj ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, s~ɕajs~ɕijat *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na pololan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na pololan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na pololan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na pololan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na pololan ħjaʔ ɣa ɣowrju. taj ʔzil na pololan ħjaʔ ɣa lkuxan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
